title: PlayerInfo
description: Lookup players UUIDs, skins, and name history in-game.
body:
# PlayerInfo!

## Description

PlayerInfo lets you look up player profiles in-game and view information such as UUIDs, previous usernames, active skins, skin model, and skin history. All of this is shown in a UI where you can, open skin links, download active skins, and customize the UI color.


![mod preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb02840a4f944303a5a0cb5748fba144bffb17b.gif)

## Commands

- `/playerinfo <player>`
- `/igns <player>`
- `/names <player>`
- `/skin <player>` - Sends a clickable link to the player's active skin.
- `/uuid <player>` - Shows the player's UUID.

## Features

- View UUIDs
- View previous usernames
- View active skins
- View skin history
- Open skin links
- Download active skins directly in-game
- Search another player from inside the UI
- Customize the UI accent color

Downloaded skins are saved in:

```text
.minecraft/playerinfo/skins/PlayerName.png
```
### How to use
- Drop the .jar file into your .minecraft/mods folder.
- Make sure you have Fabric Loader and Fabric API installed.

For support, questions, or bug reports, contact me on Discord: `barbygrill.`
